property.offer: No Realtor Fee - Move In Ready June 1st or Sooner
description_paragraphs: Welcome to 451 Heath Place, Apt 2 - a bright, garden-style 1-bedroom condo tucked into a quiet courtyard setting in Hackensack, NJ. Step inside and head up the private staircase to your sun-filled retreat on the second floor.

The open floor plan makes excellent use of 663 square feet - a large, light-filled living and dining area flows naturally through the space. The updated kitchen features new flooring, fresh countertops, and a brand-new refrigerator. The bedroom comfortably fits a king-size bed, and additional furniture is available on request.

Heat and hot water are included in rent. Move-in is June 1st or sooner by arrangement. Pets are allowed. Parking includes on-street spaces plus private resident parking in the community: you may have more than one vehicle, but resident spots are first come, first served each day - if a spot is open you may use it; if not, plan to park on the street. The street sweeper runs twice weekly: Tuesday at 7am (park on the side of the street closest to the apartment) and Friday at 9am (park on the side across the street from the apartment).
Residents share laundry facilities on the premises for the community, located on the same block as the apartment - no need to go far for wash day.

features.name: Heat Included
features.description: Natural gas radiator heat - no winter utility surprises.

features.name: Hot Water Included
features.description: Hot water covered - one less bill to think about.

features.name: Shared Laundry
features.description: Shared laundry on the premises for residents, on the same block as the apartment - convenient community laundry without leaving the block.

features.name: Parking
features.description: On-street parking plus private resident parking. More than one car is fine; resident spaces are first come, first served daily. Street sweeper: Tuesday 7am (park on the side closest to the unit), Friday 9am (park across the street from the unit).

features.name: Private Walk-Up
features.description: Your own staircase entrance - garden-style privacy.

features.name: Updated Kitchen
features.description: New floors, new countertops, brand-new refrigerator.

features.name: Furnished Option
features.description: King bed in bedroom plus living room furniture available.

features.name: Pets Allowed
features.description: Pets are welcome. Reach out with breed or size questions if you have them.

features.name: Courtyard Setting
features.description: Quiet, private community with serene outdoor space.

neighborhood.name: NYC Access
neighborhood.description: Bus and train connections to Midtown Manhattan.

neighborhood.name: Public Schools
neighborhood.description: Hackensack public schools in close proximity.

neighborhood.name: Quiet Residential Street
neighborhood.description: Courtyard building in a calm neighborhood.

site.disclaimer: Presented directly by the owner. All information believed accurate but not warranted. Subject to prior rental.
